description: Installs gitmap CLI -- a Git repository navigator tool for Windows. Sourced from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alimtvnetwork/gitmap-v19/main/gitmap/scripts/install.ps1 (UNIX equivalent: .../install.sh).

messages.notAdmin: This script requires admin privileges. Please run as Administrator.
messages.notFound: gitmap not found -- will install now
messages.notInPath: gitmap installed but not found in PATH (may need shell restart)
messages.verifyMissing: 'gitmap' not found on PATH after install -- refreshing environment...
messages.verifyRefreshed: PATH refreshed from registry. Entries added: {count}
messages.verifyFoundAt: Found gitmap.exe at {path} -- prepending its folder to session PATH
messages.verifyFinalFail: Could not run 'gitmap --version' after install. Open a NEW terminal and re-run.
messages.disabled: gitmap install is disabled in config
messages.installerLogFailed: Could not write installer transcript to {path}: {error}
messages.remoteInstallerFailed: Remote installer failed -- falling back to ZIP download
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up

flags.-Tag <ref>: Pin a git ref (branch / tag / commit) on alimtvnetwork/gitmap-v19 (e.g. main, dev, v3.181). Substituted into installUrl/releaseZipUrl. Default: main.
